use_cases: Showcasing creative portfolios or brand imagery in a dynamic 3D carousel
Displaying client logos or testimonials with continuous motion animation
Creating engaging hero sections with rotating product images
Building visual showcases for agency or design studio websites
Adding animated media galleries to landing pages
ai_summary: A 3D marquee component that displays images in three rotating columns using Framer Motion animations. Images are split into chunks and continuously animate to create a mesmerizing 3D carousel effect. Ideal for showcasing portfolios, creative work, brand imagery, or any visual content that benefits from dynamic motion and depth.
